caption: A woman with short brown hair and glasses is seated at a white desk in a crafting room. She wears a grey cardigan over a white blouse with a floral pattern. To her left, shelves hold numerous colorful markers, while a black heat tool and a heat gun are visible on the desk behind her. A sign nearby reads "MERRY CHRISTMAS". On the desk in front of her are two small items, including a pink notebook. Across the sequence, the woman speaks while gesturing. In the first frame, she holds her right hand up in a gesturing motion. By the second frame, she has clasped her hands together on the desk. In the third frame, she opens her mouth wider as she continues speaking. In the final frame, she gestures again with her right hand while her left hand remains on the desk.
